name: ButtonStates
shortDescription: Use any object as a button and change appearance according to user interactions.

eventsFunctions.name: IsIdle
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is not used.

eventsFunctions.name: IsClicked
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button was just clicked.

eventsFunctions.name: IsHovered
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the cursor is hovered over the button.

eventsFunctions.name: IsFocused
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is either hovered or pressed but not hovered.

eventsFunctions.name: IsPressed
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is currently being pressed with mouse or touch.

eventsFunctions.name: IsPressedOutside
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the button is currently being pressed outside with mouse or touch.

eventsFunctions.name: TouchId
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the touch id that is using the button or 0 if none.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Enable effects on buttons based on their state.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ButtonObjectEffects

eventsFunctions.name: IdleEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the idle state effect of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetIdleEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Change the idle state effect of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FocusedEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the focused state effect of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFocusedEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Change the focused state effect of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: PressedEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the pressed state effect of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetPressedEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Change the pressed state effect of the object.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Change the animation of buttons according to their state.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ButtonAnimationName

eventsFunctions.name: IdleAnimationName
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the idle state animation name of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetIdleAnimationName
eventsFunctions.description: Change the idle state animation name of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FocusedAnimationName
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the focused state animation name of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFocusedAnimationName
eventsFunctions.description: Change the focused state animation name of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: PressedAnimationName
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the pressed state animation name of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetPressedAnimationName
eventsFunctions.description: Change the pressed state animation name of the object.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Smoothly change an effect on buttons according to their state.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ButtonObjectEffectTween

eventsFunctions.name: EffectName
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the effect name of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: EffectProperty
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the effect parameter of the object. The effect parameter names can be found in the effects tab with the "Show parameter names" action of the drop down menu.

eventsFunctions.name: SetEffectProperty
eventsFunctions.description: Change the effect parameter of the object. The effect parameter names can be found in the effects tab with the "Show parameter names" action of the drop down menu.

eventsFunctions.name: IdleValue
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the idle effect parameter value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetIdleValue
eventsFunctions.description: Change the idle effect parameter value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FocusedValue
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the focused effect parameter value of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFocusedValue
eventsFunctions.description: Change the focused effect parameter value of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: PressedValue
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the pressed effect parameter value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetPressedValue
eventsFunctions.description: Change the pressed effect parameter value of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeInEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-in easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeInEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-in easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeOutEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-out easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeOutEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-out easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeInDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-in duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeInDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-in duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeOutDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-out duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeOutDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-out duration of the object.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Smoothly resize buttons according to their state.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ButtonScaleTween

eventsFunctions.name: IdleScale
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the idle state size scale of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetIdleScale
eventsFunctions.description: Change the idle state size scale of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FocusedScale
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the focused state size scale of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFocusedScale
eventsFunctions.description: Change the focused state size scale of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: PressedScale
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the pressed state size scale of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetPressedScale
eventsFunctions.description: Change the pressed state size scale of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeInDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-in duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeInDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-in duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeOutDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-out duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeOutDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-out duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeInEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-in easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeInEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-in easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeOutEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-out easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeOutEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-out easing of the object.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Smoothly change the color tint of buttons according to their state.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ButtonColorTintTween

eventsFunctions.name: IdleColorTint
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the idle state color tint of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetIdleColorTint
eventsFunctions.description: Change the idle state color tint of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FocusedColorTint
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the focused state color tint of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFocusedColorTint
eventsFunctions.description: Change the focused state color tint of the object. The state is Focused when the button is hovered or held outside.

eventsFunctions.name: PressedColorTint
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the pressed state color tint of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetPressedColorTint
eventsFunctions.description: Change the pressed state color tint of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeInDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-in duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeInDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-in duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeOutDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-out duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeOutDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-out duration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeInEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-in easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeInEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-in easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FadeOutEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the fade-out easing of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFadeOutEasing
eventsFunctions.description: Change the fade-out easing of the object.

description:
Use the "Button states" behavior to track user interactions with an object, including:

- Hovered
- Pressed
- Clicked
- Idle

Add additional behaviors to make juicy buttons with animated responses to user input:

- Size
- Color
- Animation
- Object effects
